summary: Iteration 82: Complete Phase B testing for Student Growth Platform. All 8 features verified: (1) Collapsible scheduler with chevron toggles, (2) Calendar view with color-coded programs, (3) Daily progress tracking with star ratings, (4) Extraordinary moments marking with amber highlighting, (5) Student pause feature with modal, (6) Admin allow_pause toggle in subscriber form, (7) Sidebar with 'My Calendar' and 'Daily Progress', (8) Financials with Pause/Resume buttons. Backend: 24/24 tests passed. Frontend: All UI components working.

details: Found 4 program sections: AWRP, Money Magic Multiplier, Bi-Annual Downloads, Quarterly Meetups
Found 4 collapsible toggle buttons with chevron icons
Collapse/expand functionality working - toggle buttons clickable
Save & Sync to All button found
Schedule tables with Start Date, End Date, Time, Note, Done, Status columns
Generate Slots button available for programs without schedules
My Calendar page loads at /dashboard/sessions
Color-coded legend: AWRP (purple), Money Magic Multiplier (amber), Quarterly Meetups (green), Bi-Annual Downloads (blue)
Month navigation: prev/next/today buttons working
31 calendar day cells displayed for March 2026
AWRP sessions displayed on calendar days with color indicators
Month Overview section: Active Days (28), Programs (1), Sessions (1), Completed (1)
Daily Progress page loads at /dashboard/progress
Stats cards: Active Days (3), Current Streak (1d), Extraordinary (1), Avg Rating (4.7)
Progress calendar grid with color coding: green=Done, amber=Extraordinary, gray=Missed
Progress modal opens when clicking past day
Modal contains: Program selector, 5-star rating system, Notes textarea
Save Progress button functional
Mark as Extraordinary Moment checkbox in progress modal
Extraordinary note input appears when checkbox is checked
Extraordinary days highlighted in amber on progress calendar
Extraordinary Moments section shows at bottom of progress page
Pause button visible for AWRP program (allow_pause=true)
Pause modal opens with: Pause Start date, Pause End date, Reason input
Confirm Pause button (amber color)
X close button to dismiss modal
POST /api/student/pause-program returns 200 for allowed programs
Annual Subscribers tab shows subscriber list
Edit subscriber form shows PROGRAMS IN PACKAGE section
Each program row has 'Pausable' checkbox
AWRP has Pausable checked, Money Magic Multiplier has Pausable unchecked
Checkbox toggles allow_pause field in program detail
Sidebar shows 'My Calendar' link under JOURNEY section
Sidebar shows 'Daily Progress' link under JOURNEY section
Both links navigate to correct pages
'Financials & EMI' link under MY SPACE section
Sacred Exchange page shows financial summary
4 program cards displayed in My Programs section
Pause button visible for AWRP (allow_pause=true)
Resume button would appear for paused programs
EMI Schedule table with Pay Now buttons

seed_data_creation: Used existing test data. Priya Sharma has 4 programs: AWRP (allow_pause=True), Money Magic Multiplier, Quarterly Meetups, Bi-Annual Downloads. Pre-seeded daily progress for March 15 (regular) and March 16 (extraordinary).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 82 verified Phase B features for Student Growth Platform. Key features implemented: (1) Admin Scheduler tab has collapsible sections per program with chevron icons. (2) Student /dashboard/sessions shows monthly calendar with color-coded programs (purple=AWRP, amber=MMM, green=QM, blue=BAD). (3) Student /dashboard/progress shows daily tracking with star ratings and calendar grid. (4) Extraordinary moments can be marked with is_extraordinary checkbox and highlighted in amber. (5) Students can pause programs (if allow_pause=true) via POST /api/student/pause-program with start/end dates. (6) Admin can toggle 'Pausable' checkbox per program in subscriber edit form. (7) Sidebar updated with My Calendar and Daily Progress nav items. (8) Financials page shows Pause button for pausable programs. Backend endpoints: POST /api/student/daily-progress, GET /api/student/daily-progress, GET /api/student/extraordinary-moments, POST /api/student/pause-program, POST /api/student/resume-program-simple.
